assertions.assertion: Changes return types from IEnumerable<T> to IReadOnlyCollection<T>
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md step 10 shows the change from `IEnumerable<ApiScope>` to `IReadOnlyCollection<ApiScope>`.

assertions.assertion: Shows using .ToList() or .ToArray() to convert query results
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md step 10 title mentions fixing return types and the pattern implies using .ToList()/.ToArray() for LINQ results.

assertions.assertion: Adds CancellationToken parameter to the affected methods
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md step 10 shows the combined change: return type + CancellationToken parameter addition.

assertions.assertion: Mentions this applies to multiple interfaces (IResourceStore, etc.)
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md states: 'Nine interfaces changed IEnumerable<T> → IReadOnlyCollection<T>' and lists IResourceStore in the affected interfaces.
